summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Eletrofunk Cachorrada DJ voting site. Backend APIs working well (94.4% success rate). Frontend has critical audio element error causing interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Vote buttons not clickable due to element interception and instability
Cannot open vote modal to test form validation and submission

integration_issues.issue: Unable to test complete vote flow due to modal accessibility issues

critical_errors.error: Uncaught runtime errors: The element has no supported sources
critical_errors.impact: May be causing page instability and preventing proper user interactions

passed_tests: Backend API connectivity and all endpoints
DJ ranking display with vote counts and percentages
Hero section with logo and background image
DJ profiles section with bio and keywords
Events section with WhatsApp integration buttons
Footer with CNPJ and Instagram link
CPF validation and duplicate vote prevention (backend)
Vote statistics and DJ retrieval by slug (backend)
action_item_for_main_agent: Fix critical audio element error 'The element has no supported sources' which may be causing page instability. Fix vote button click interception issues to enable vote modal functionality. The audio source URL may be invalid or the audio element needs proper error handling.
success_percentage: Backend: 94.4%, Frontend: 70% (major functionality blocked by audio error)
